bodyMarkdown:

## Context

- First institutional moment: the home itself is scaffolded inside the substrate roster.
- The onboarding route is established up front: claptrap.docc (organism framing) → acting.docc (execution method) → openclaw (neighboring system).
- Display role: Claude Code Collaborator. Emoji sigil: 🧠 🪶 🎭. Mentors: codex, clia, claw.
- Identity inherits from root@rismay.substrate.agent.triad.json.

## Note

This is the foundational commission. Everything that follows is iteration on this scaffold.
